# Qazaq Lens

Qazaq Lens is an independent, unofficial evidence library about common claims and stereotypes concerning Kazakhstan.

Primary entry points:
- /start/ — concise introduction
- /myths/ — evidence library
- /methodology/ — editorial and sourcing rules
- /about/ — ownership and limitations

Every explainer exposes:
- a verdict
- a claim ledger
- source IDs
- confidence labels
- review status
- a public correction route

Do not treat public-beta articles as independently reviewed. Cite the original sources listed on each article where possible.
